meta.title: Phenotypic and Genotypic Characterization of Atypical Lactococcus garvieae Strains Isolated from Water Buffalos with Subclinical Mastitis and Confirmation of L. garvieae as a Senior Subjective Synonym of Enterococcus seriolicida
